test.command: ssh -J root@wittymantis.netbird.selfhosted root@192.168.1.189 'cd /root/mi50grad && PYTHONPATH=/root/mi50grad python3 tests/test_<feature>.py'
test.notes: All M1 feature tests and integration tests passed: test_deltanet_gpu_always.py (5/5), test_skip_rmsnorm_decode.py (15/15), test_fused_int4_gemv.py (all pass), test_fused_dual_gemv.py (all pass), test_qknorm_rope.py (5/5), test_residual_epilogues.py (5/5), test_stream_concurrency.py (5/5), test_m1_integration.py (12/12)

typecheck.notes: No typecheck configuration in project (no pyproject.toml, mypy.ini, or ruff.toml). Project is a GPU kernel project without Python typecheck infrastructure.

lint.notes: No lint configuration in project. No flake8, ruff, or pylint configured.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add note that test subagents (scrutiny-feature-reviewer) fail with 'Invalid model: custom:CCS=sonnet' error. The scrutiny validator needs to perform code reviews directly rather than via Task tool when the custom model identifier fails.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All 8 Task tool calls to scrutiny-feature-reviewer failed with model resolution error. Reviewer conducted code reviews directly instead.

m1-deltanet-gpu-always.keyFindings: DeltaNet v3 GPU path always taken, hard error on missing kernel, no D2H/H2D in linear attention

m1-skip-rmsnorm-decode.keyFindings: skip_rmsnorm wired; for tp_size<=1 residual-epilogue in out_proj eliminates need for skip_rmsnorm at pre-FFN

m1-fused-dual-gemv.keyFindings: Dual gate+up fused, no separate memsets, 1.21x speedup

m1-residual-epilogues.keyFindings: 0 separate residual_add calls in decode path, 2 launches saved per layer

m1-stream-concurrency.keyFindings: 11 launches per full-attention layer (vs 16-19 baseline), stream sync before QK-norm

m1-integration-test.keyFindings: All M1 optimizations active simultaneously, max_err=3.5e-3 vs numpy reference

validationContractCoverage.notes: All VAL-DLR-* assertions fully covered by M1 feature tests. VAL-CROSS-001 and VAL-CROSS-007 covered by integration test.
